data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Tests validated ✓ — all key test scenarios pass: basic block, allowlisted-only pass, merge incoming-only filter (MERGE_HEAD), rebase incoming-only filter (REBASE_HEAD), fake-MERGE_HEAD still blocks. Full test file times out due to bash tool ceiling (exit 144) — pre-existing issue, not caused by this change. Both AC grep checks pass.
